feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Adobe not allowing multiple use of work-area fields or variable
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I want fixed header data for every page in the ADOBE form. That's why I used the header part in the master page, but on the second (next) page, all the texts are coming, and the field values are blank. 

Is Adobe not allowing this type of multiple use, or am I missing any configuration?

entry.title: How to Get a list of non-posted Goods Receipt deliveries?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How to Get a list of non-posted Goods Receipt deliveries?
Which was made with ( Post Goods Issue ) in vl02n, but not posted with migo yet.
If there are any FM or smth else for getting it?

entry.title: How to display the fields vertically
entry.content:
Hi there! please how can I show the fields vertically in one column under title "Description"

 

FORM f_prepare_AFFECT_DATA2.

CALL METHOD obj_test->prepare_affect_resultat2
  EXPORTING
    it_grp_nature    = gt_grp_nature
    it_description_a =  gt_affect_a2                 
  IMPORTING
    et_affect2_alv   =  gt_alv_affect2               
  .

ENDFORM.

FORM show_affect2.

  DATA: lt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat,
        ls_fieldcat TYPE lvc_s_fcat,
        ls_layout   TYPE lvc_s_layo.

  g_subscreen = '0107'.

  " Define Field Catalog
  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'REPORT_NOUVEAU'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Report Nouveau'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'RESULTAT_NET_I'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Résultat Net I'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'RESULTAT_NET_E'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Résultat Net E'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'PRELEVEMENT'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Prélèvement'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'AUTRE_PRELEVEMENT'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Autre Prélèvement'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  ls_layout-zebra = abap_true.

  " Container and Grid Initialization
  IF go_container IS NOT BOUND.

    CREATE OBJECT go_container
      EXPORTING
        container_name              = 'CC_ALV1'
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_error                  = 1
        cntl_system_error           = 2
        create_error                = 3
        lifetime_error              = 4
        lifetime_dynpro_dynpro_link = 5
        OTHERS                      = 6.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

  CHECK go_container IS BOUND.

  IF go_grid IS NOT BOUND.

    CREATE OBJECT go_grid
      EXPORTING
        i_parent = go_container
      EXCEPTIONS
        error_cntl_create = 1
        error_cntl_init   = 2
        error_cntl_link   = 3
        error_dp_create   = 4
        OTHERS            = 5.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

  ENDIF.

  CALL METHOD go_grid->set_table_for_first_display
    EXPORTING
      is_layout       = ls_layout
    CHANGING
      it_outtab       = gt_alv_affect2
      it_fieldcatalog = lt_fieldcat.

ENDFORM.

Normally it show like this:

But I want to show it like this:

Thank you

entry.title: ABAP Error
entry.content:
Hi guys,

I am configuring on the ECC EHP8 (Trial Environment), on CAL. I get the following errors when I attempt to create a purchase order and also trying to create a business partner. Please see the attached errors and assist.

entry.title: How to set up an ATC check run for enhancements in an S/4HANA 758 system?
entry.content:
Hi All!

After resolving the issue with getting an ATC tool failure when checking enhancements in an S/4HANA 758 system, I'm now trying to include enhancements in a check run but the provided objects are ignored and no check happens from what I can tell.

I'm including both the enhancement names in our Z-namespace as well as the enhanced SAP objects SAPMV45A and SAPMV50A but compared to a NW 750 system I can no longer explicitely include enhanced objects as the checkbox no longer exists:

Regardless of which combination of object set or free object selection I try, the check ends after a few seconds as if it's not even looking at any of the objects to check:

When I run a comparable check in our central ATC system which is on S/4HANA 756 for an enhancement of SAPMV45A in a NW 750 system, it runs a couple of minutes and produces a result with expected findings:

Does anybody know what the trick is to get a comparable result for enhancements in an S/4HANA 758 system?

This is what I provide when defining the check run, both in the central ATC-system for a check in NW 750 and the new S4HANA development system:

Thanks much and cheers

Bärbel

Update June 13, 2025: In the meantime I raised an OSS-incident which is currently in process by SAP. I'll provide updates as I learn more about this issue.

entry.title: Complete Revenue-Generating SAP Mobile App with ABAP Backend & Flutter Frontend
entry.content:
The Untapped Opportunity in SAP Mobility

While SAP powers over 400,000 businesses worldwide, most companies still struggle with mobile access to their critical data. Warehouse workers use paper printouts, sales teams carry laptops for simple approvals, and field technicians can't update work orders in real-time.

This gap represents a golden opportunity for SAP developers. By combining your ABAP skills with modern mobile development, you can create solutions that:

  • Solve real operational pain points

  • Generate recurring revenue

  • Establish you as a SAP mobility expert

Introducing: SAP Inventory Scanner Pro

Our sample app concept addresses one of the most universal needs - mobile inventory management. Here's why this works:

Core Value Proposition

  • Instant barcode scanning to check stock levels

  • Offline-capable for warehouse dead zones

  • Real-time SAP updates without paperwork

Technical Architecture

Diagram
 
Code
 
 
Copy
 
Download
graph LR
A[Mobile App - Flutter] -->|OData| B[SAP Gateway]
B --> C[ABAP Backend]
C --> D[SAP Tables]

Monetization Strategies That Work

1. Freemium Model (Maximize Adoption)

  • Free tier: 10 scans/day + ads

  • Pro upgrade: $4.99 removes limits and ads

2. Enterprise Features (High-Value)

  • Team management @ $9.99/user/month

  • White-label versions for SAP partners

3. Strategic Partnerships

  • Revenue sharing with SAP consultancies

  • Paid API access for system integrators

Real-World Success Metrics

Case Study Revenue Model MRR
WarehouseGoSubscription$22K
SAP Scan ProIn-App Purchases$8K
Field InspectorEnterprise License$45K

Data from actual SAP mobile apps in production

Getting Started: Your 4-Week Launch Plan

  1. Week 1-2: Build MVP

    • Single OData service for material lookup

    • Basic Flutter scanner interface

  2. Week 3: Add Monetization

    • Google AdMob integration

    • In-app purchase scaffolding

  3. Week 4: Pilot Deployment

    • Beta test with 3-5 local SAP clients

    • Collect feedback for iteration

Why This Works Now

  1. SAP's mobile push - Fiori adoption is creating demand

  2. 5G expansion - Makes mobile SAP viable in warehouses

  3. Post-pandemic trends - 73% of businesses now prioritize mobile ops

METHOD /iwbep/if_mgw_appl_srv_runtime~get_entity.

  CASE iv_entity_name.

    WHEN 'Material'.

      " Fetch SAP material details

      SELECT SINGLE matnr, maktx, meins, labst

      FROM makt

      JOIN mard ON mard~matnr = makt~matnr

      INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF er_entity

      WHERE makt~matnr = iv_key_values[ 1 ]-value

      AND makt~spras = 'EN'.

     

      IF sy-subrc <> 0.

        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception.

      ENDIF.

     

    WHEN 'InventoryUpdate'.

      " Process mobile inventory updates

      DATA(ls_update) = io_data_provider->read_entry_data( ).

     

      UPDATE mard SET labst = ls_update-quantity

      WHERE matnr = ls_update-material

      AND werks = ls_update-plant.

     

      IF sy-subrc = 0.

        COMMIT WORK.

        er_entity = ls_update.

      ELSE.

        ROLLBACK WORK.

        RAISE EXCEPTION TYPE /iwbep/cx_mgw_busi_exception.

      ENDIF.

  ENDCASE.

ENDMETHOD.

Enable API Access in SAP
Activate IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE (SAP Gateway)
Whitelist mobile app IP (if needed)
Set up OAuth 2.0 (Transaction SOAUTH2)
Flutter Mobile App (Frontend)
Setup & SAP Connection
// lib/services/sap_service.dart

class SAPService {

  final String _odataUrl = "https://your-sap-server:port/sap/opu/odata/sap/ZINVENTORY_SRV/";

 

  Future<Material> fetchMaterial(String barcode) async {

    final response = await http.get(

      Uri.parse("${_odataUrl}MaterialSet('$barcode')"),

      headers: {"Authorization": "Bearer $accessToken"},

    );

   

    if (response.statusCode == 200) {

      return Material.fromJson(jsonDecode(response.body));

    } else {

      throw Exception("Failed to fetch material");

    }

  }

 

  Future<bool> updateStock(String material, double newQty) async {

    final response = await http.post(

      Uri.parse("${_odataUrl}InventoryUpdateSet"),

      headers: {"Authorization": "Bearer $accessToken"},

      body: jsonEncode({"Material": material, "Quantity": newQty}),

    );

    return response.statusCode == 201;

  }

}

Barcode Scanner & UI
// lib/screens/scan_screen.dart

class ScanScreen extends StatefulWidget {

  @override

  _ScanScreenState createState() => _ScanScreenState();

}

 

class _ScanScreenState extends State<ScanScreen> {

  final _sapService = SAPService();

  Material? _scannedMaterial;

 

  Future<void> _scanBarcode() async {

    final barcode = await BarcodeScanner.scan(); // Using flutter_barcode_scanner

    if (barcode.isEmpty) return;

 

    final material = await _sapService.fetchMaterial(barcode);

    setState(() => _scannedMaterial = material);

  }

 

  @override

  Widget build(BuildContext context) {

    return Scaffold(

      appBar: AppBar(title: Text("SAP Inventory Scanner")),

      body: Column(

        children: [

          ElevatedButton(

            onPressed: _scanBarcode,

            child: Text("Scan Barcode"),

          ),

          if (_scannedMaterial != null) _buildMaterialCard(),

          if (_isFreeUser) AdWidget(ad: _bannerAd), // Ads for free users

        ],

      ),

    );

  }

}

Monetization Strategies
Google AdMob Integration
// Initialize ads in main.dart

void main() async {

  WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized();

  MobileAds.instance.initialize();

  runApp(MyApp());

}

 

// Show banner ad

final BannerAd _bannerAd = BannerAd(

  size: AdSize.banner,

  adUnitId: Platform.isAndroid

      ? 'ca-app-pub-3940256099942544/6300978111' // Test ID

      : 'ca-app-pub-3940256099942544/2934735716',

  listener: BannerAdListener(),

  request: AdRequest(),

)..load();

In-App Purchases (Premium Features)
 

// lib/services/purchase_service.dart

class PurchaseService {

  static const _premiumId = 'inventory_scanner_premium';

 

  Future<bool> unlockPremium() async {

    final available = await InAppPurchase.instance.isAvailable();

    if (!available) return false;

 

    final response = await InAppPurchase.instance.buyNonConsumable(

      purchaseParam: PurchaseParam(productDetails: _premiumProduct),

    );

 

    return response.status == PurchaseStatus.purchased;

  }

}

Subscription Model (Monthly SAP Access)
// Check subscription status

Future<bool> _checkSubscription() async {

  final purchases = await InAppPurchase.instance.getAvailablePurchases();

  return purchases.any((p) => p.productID == 'monthly_subscription');

}

 #Prompt Engineering #AI generared ideas #ABAP as backend

entry.title: SAP spool generated by smartforms restricted with 1000 pages
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a pick list smartforms which should generate a spool with 1500 pages in our system.

However, when we check in SP01 the spool got generated with 1000 pages only. I tried by downloading the spool using RSTXPDFT4 still same issue there as well.  

I guess it is restricted due to file size as i could see the downloaded file contain 5.5 MB.

How can I get fix this issue. Does anyone has come across this problem.

 

Thanks 

Manimaran K

entry.title: BGPF SBGQC queue context and destination not transporting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently on an ON Premise S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 installation and am using SBGQC (Eclipse adt doesn't support support it in our installation atm) to create Background Processing Queue Contexts for the background processing framework. This works without a hitch.

However, when transporting, the entry in the mapping table BGQC_DEST_MATCH for queue context name to bgrfc inbound destination isn't transported. Neither is the bgrf. Inbound destination. 

Any suggestions on how to fix this are welcome! 

EDIT : For the moment, I created both mapping table entry and BGRFC destination manually. But there has to be a better way. SBGQC wouldn't run in a test / production system without the client being open.

entry.title: Multiple checkbox data saving in Module pool
entry.content:
Hello Team,

   I am Working in Module pool where i need to replace radio buttons into checkbox and user can select multiple checkboxes from given options, problem is until now there was only one radio button selected and data was saving in that field according to selection mail was triggered to respective department,  but now there is multiple checkboxes user can select so how can i save data for selected checkboxes in one field and send mail according to selected checkboxes. below is the snap of screen 
Anyone having worked on same scenario than please send me Code.

Nature of work

entry.title: CDS Table Entities - for On-Prem & Private Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone tell me when CDS Table entities will be made available on the various ABAP Cloud versions? I heard that it should be available on ABAP Public Cloud on 2502 but have not found when it's coming to on-premise and private cloud systems.

A detailed overview of CDS Table Entities:

https://youtu.be/s8i44J4t7J0?si=Ow_knT4fhY3i3dxF&t=345

entry.title: How to filter a cds search help result based on a UI field?
entry.content:
@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [

{ entity:{ element: 'Version',

name: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH' } },

{ distinctValues: true, useForValidation: true },

{ additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'Aadhar',

element: 'AadharID',

usage: #FILTER }] }

 

I am using the highlighted annotation in bold to filter the cds result.

I want the result of the cds to return values of version where aadhar value

matches not all unrelated values. but it is not working. Please help.

 

regards,

Prasenjit

entry.title: How to add REVLV field in ME2L/ME2M Report
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

How to add REVLV field in ME2L and ME2M Report.

entry.title: Custom Hierarchy in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on creation of Query CDS which is used in SAC/AFO for building dashboards. In this we want to Implement a Hierarchy in a particular field I have created a custom table where I have maintained the hierarch nodes accordingly.



I  want consume this hierarchy through the CDS to AFO/SAC.
I have tried using annotations in base cube like this ,


I defined the hierarchy in a cds with self association. and through annotations I imported the hierarchy on field called ZdimGrpaccnt.

Then I consumed this CDS in a Query CDS.



While consuming it in AFO the hierarchy is not enabled on the column.


Also I tried through define hierarchy Approach. It is also not working

 

While testing the hierarchy through the Class and table function, I'm getting the hierarchy as needed.

 

 


Can Somebody please suggest how to achieve hierachy in AFO/SAC in this scenerio.
please provide some detailed steps of what needs to be done.


Many Thanks in Advance,
Regards,
Arasu

entry.title: Attendance Punching Machine database data reading
entry.content:
I have multiple attendance machines that store fingerprints in a SQL Server database.
I plan to connect SAP with SQL Server using a DBCON connection and develop an ABAP program to read and insert records into the TEVEN table or a Z-table.
Is this approach correct? Should I use BAPIs to update TEVEN or write directly? Any advice on job scheduling and duplicate record handling?

entry.title: Customer tab in QM03 - Notification
entry.content:
Hello folks ! 

in QM03, i'm not able to see sold to party , it is empty however in QMEL/VIQMEL customer is populated (KUNUM field).

Can any one help please.

Thanks

entry.title: ABAP RAP managed scenario Default values
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following requirement in ABAP RAP managed scenario non-draft. I have to populate default values for few properties like currency code.

The trigger should be after clicking on the create button. like the PBO init event in classical ABAP.

I have tried to use the determination , but the code is triggerd too late, at the moment after the user clicks on the save button.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Issue with SQL Query Result Differ From Manual Table Execution - EKPO & EKBE
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m facing an issue with a SQL query in an ABAP report that uses a JOIN and a SUM aggregation.

Example Scenario:

For a specific matnr (material number) and werks (plant), along with the other conditions, the expected SUM of quantity is 30. But the query during execution returns 120.

Problem:

When I manually pass the inputs in table level I get the correct result. However, when the same inputs are passed in query and is executed during runtime with the values passed through variables, it returns incorrect results.

Strangely, this issue occurs only in the PRD system – in DEV, it works as expected.

Here is the query I’m using:

SELECT SUM( CASE  WHEN _ekbe~shkzg = 'H'
                          THEN _ekbe~menge * ( -1 )
                          ELSE  _ekbe~menge
                   END )
       FROM ekpo AS _ekpo
       INNER JOIN ekbe AS _ekbe
         ON _ekbe~matnr EQ _ekpo~matnr
         AND _ekbe~ebeln EQ _ekpo~ebeln
         AND _ekbe~bwart IS NOT INITIAL
       WHERE _ekpo~matnr = @meprnitem-matnr
       AND _ekpo~werks = @meprnitem-werks
       AND _ekpo~elikz IS INITIAL
       AND _ekpo~loekz IS INITIAL
       INTO @LV_quant_ekbe.

entry.title: S4/Hana Custom Code Check question regarding Material fieldlength extension
entry.content:
Hello,

we have several own RFC's. The ATC-Check complains "Type component ... used by RFC-Function parameter - The parameter type of a RFC-Function is a structure where one component has an extended type. Problems can occur if this function is called."

How can I exacly comment this Message out ( Pseudocomment "#EC CI_FLDEXT_OK[2215424] does not work, di do it like this:

FUNCTION z_ws_delivery_update. "#EC CI_FLDEXT_OK[2215424]
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Globale Schnittstelle:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     VALUE(VBKOK_WA) LIKE  VBKOK STRUCTURE  VBKOK

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX demo programs
entry.content:
Experts,

I am trying to install ABAP2XLSX demo programs in a local package. I am getting an error while trying to activate the programs. 

TYPE ZCL_EXCEL is unknown.

I have attached the error screenshot. I followed the steps in this link to setup ABAP GIT standalone program. 
Can you please let me know if I missed any step which is causing the issue. 

Thanks

Bharath
